class.name: GFValidationDiagnosticAdapter
class.description: GFValidationDiagnosticAdapter: 校验报告到编辑器诊断数据的适配器。 只把 `GFValidationIssue`、`GFValidationReport` 或兼容字典转换成纯 Dictionary 诊断记录，不创建 UI，也不假设具体编辑器控件，便于 Inspector、Dock、CI 和项目工具复用。

member.name: issue_to_diagnostic
member.signature: static func issue_to_diagnostic(issue: Variant, options: Dictionary = {}) -> Dictionary:
member.description: 将单个问题转换成诊断字典。

tags.tag: issue: GFValidationIssue 或兼容问题字典。
诊断字典；输入无效时返回空字典。
issue: Variant accepting GFValidationIssue or Dictionary issue payload.

member.name: report_to_diagnostics
member.signature: static func report_to_diagnostics(source: Variant, options: Dictionary = {}) -> Array[Dictionary]:
member.description: 将报告、报告字典或问题数组转换成诊断数组。

tags.tag: source: GFValidationReport、报告字典或问题数组。
source: Variant accepting GFValidationReport, Dictionary report payload, or Array issues.
return: Array of Dictionary editor diagnostic records.
diagnostics: Array of Dictionary editor diagnostic records.
return: Dictionary keyed by source_path with diagnostic arrays.

member.name: make_line_records
member.signature: static func make_line_records(diagnostics: Array[Dictionary], options: Dictionary = {}) -> Array[Dictionary]:
member.description: 生成适合行号栏、问题列表或资源面板消费的行记录。

tags.tag: options: 可选参数，支持 include_positionless。
diagnostics: Array of Dictionary editor diagnostic records.
options: Dictionary line record conversion options.
return: Array of Dictionary line records.

member.name: make_display_text
member.description: 生成单条诊断的简短显示文本。

member.name: make_tooltip
member.description: 生成单条诊断的工具提示文本。
